title: Fury in France after child murder suspect's criminal record released
summary_full: A man suspected of murdering an 11-year-old girl had previously been identified as a potential child molester, records show.
summary_public: A man suspected of murdering an 11-year-old girl had previously been identified as a potential child molester, records show.
